name: Cossack Chicken & Mushrooms
recipeIngredient: 3 tbsp Sour cream or plain yogurt
1/2 lb Mushrooms, fresh, washed and coarsely chopped
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the onion and mushrooms together in 4 tablespoons of butter.
2. Mince the onion-mushroom mixture and chicken together.
3. Add garlic to the minced mixture and cook for 5 minutes, adding salt and pepper to taste.
4. Remove from heat and stir in yogurt and nutmeg.
5. Preheat oven to 400 degrees F (200 degrees C).
6. Pour the chicken mixture into a baking dish and sprinkle with grated cheese.
7. Bake for 15 minutes.
